name: phoenix-comms
description: Cross-agent communication via shared LEDGER heartbeats. Enables Echo and Codex to see each other's presence and recent activity without derailing from their own tasks.

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start heartbeat — writes presence to HEARTBEAT file on configurable interval

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stop heartbeat gracefully via PID file

commands.name: check
commands.description: Quick check — is the other agent alive? Action names only, anti-derail boundary

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show who's alive and comms state — quick glance at cross-agent presence

skills.name: heartbeat-writer
skills.description: Writes current agent's heartbeat — called periodically during long sessions

skills.name: team-awareness
skills.description: On session start, reads both heartbeats + last 5 LEDGER entries from each agent, presents team context
